---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AnyResearch
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.  
e.g. "I'd like to be able to visualize topic trends over time, but currently the Summary sheet only shows raw counts."

---

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| **Target layer** | Layer 0 / 1 / 2 / 3 — which layer would this feature belong to? |
| **Input** | What data or parameters would the feature consume? |
| **Output** | What would the feature produce (Excel sheet, CSV, plot, etc.)? |
| **MATLAB-only?** | Should this remain MATLAB-only, or is Python acceptable? |

---

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

---

## Use case

Describe the concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

e.g.:
- "As a faculty member, I want to receive a weekly diff report so that I can track newly published papers without re-reading the entire sheet."
- "As an IR officer, I want a heatmap of topic × year so that I can identify which sub-fields are growing at our institution."

---

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references (papers, tools) that support the feature request.
